body.Industry: Email API / Developer Tools / Software Development
body.LatestValuation: Undisclosed post-Series A; estimated to exceed $100M based on Series A size and lead investor (a16z); earlier seed-stage valuation reported at ~$25M (April 2023)
body.FundingRounds: 1) Pre-Seed: ~$500K from Y Combinator (April 2023, YC Winter 2023 batch); 2) Seed: $3M from strategic angels including Dylan Field (Figma), Guillermo Rauch (Vercel), and Paul Copplestone (Supabase) (July 2023); 3) Series A: $18M led by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) with participation from Eric Muntz (former CTO of Mailchimp), Y Combinator Continuity Fund (Ali Rowghani), and Basecase (December 4, 2024)
body.KeyInvestors: Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Y Combinator, Basecase Capital, Ali Rowghani (YC Continuity Fund, former CFO of Pixar / COO of Twitter), Eric Muntz (former CTO of Mailchimp), Guillermo Rauch (Vercel CEO), Dylan Field (Figma CEO), Paul Copplestone (Supabase CEO), Michael Grinich; 16 total investors (5 institutional, 11 angel)
body.EmployeeCountEstimate: ~25 employees across 9 countries (as of 2025); some sources cite up to 74 as of May 2026
body.GrowthMetrics: 1M users by December 2025 (up from 249K in early 2025, ~4x growth in under a year); 5,000+ paying customers; 59% of Y Combinator W25 batch uses Resend; React Email open-source project crossed 300K weekly npm downloads and 14K+ GitHub stars; ~$1M revenue per employee; 412% YoY website traffic growth; tens of millions of emails processed daily
body.RecentDealsAndExits: No acquisitions or exits reported. Latest deal: $18M Series A closed December 4, 2024, led by Andreessen Horowitz. Company is private and growth-stage with no IPO or M&A activity disclosed.
body.ComparableCompanies: SendGrid (acquired by Twilio), Mailgun (acquired by Sinch), Postmark (acquired by ActiveCampaign), Mailchimp (acquired by Intuit), Pathwire, Manybrain, Debug Mail, MailSlurp
body.DataConfidenceNotes: Funding round amounts ($500K pre-seed, $3M seed, $18M Series A) are sourced from official company blog posts and reputable trackers (Tracxn, CB Insights, Crunchbase) — high confidence. Total funding of $21–$21.5M is consistent across multiple sources. Post-Series A valuation is unconfirmed/undisclosed; the $100M+ estimate is an analyst inference. Revenue figures ($5M 2024, $25M 2025) are estimates from third-party sources (GetLatka, checkthat.ai) and not officially confirmed by Resend. Employee count varies by source (25 vs. 74) — likely reflects different reporting periods. All figures should be verified against official disclosures before use in financial decisions.
